calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der explained the nature of working with Ms. Droebner, services provided by Ms. Dolch, and costs associated with the family law matter and visitation. Mr. Der also stated that they are down to about $50,000.00, that the Trust will be over soon, that they have not been paid and that they have to have a discussion with Ms. Droebner as to how to wrap up the Trust. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Continued To Sep-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Continued To Aug-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

The accounting petition was taken under submission for the Court to address the request for a $10,000.00 retainer for future Attorney's fees in the Family Law matter.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Continued To Jul-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Continued To Jul-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner). Tim Chambers for Ann Darsky (Beneficiary).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions and addressed the issues raised by the Court. The Petition for Instructions was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Advanced From May-18-11 To Apr-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

Ms. Dolch is to make payment of the mortgage directly to the Lenders and payment of rent directly to the Landlord. Once the unit (condominium) is sold assuming there are sufficient funds, the Trust should be reimbursed for advanced payment of the first and second mortgage. The Court approved the petition for instructions (subject to review/revision of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Ex Parte Application For An Order Advancing Hearing Date And For Shortening Of Time
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Of Beneficiary Ann Darsky To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee And For Payment Of Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Off Calendar

Petition Of Beneficiary Ann Darsky To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee And For Payment Of Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Mar-15-2011 Continued To Apr-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Temporary Successor Trustee).

Mr. Der stated that they reached a stipulation late yesterday, that they were requesting the matter be taken off calendar, but that he did not have all of the signatures yet. The matter was continued to April 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If everything is in order at that time, the matter can then go off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition Of Beneficiary Ann Darsky To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee And For Payment Of Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Continued To Mar-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught for Aaron Darsky. Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Temporary Successor Trustee).

Counsel stated that they were working on a stipulation and requested a short continuance. The matter was continued to March 15, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court signed the order extending Ms. Dolch's powers to that same date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Petition Of Beneficiary Ann Darsky To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee And For Payment Of Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Continued To Feb-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition Of Beneficiary Ann Darsky To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Temporary Successor Trustee [Probate Code Sec 17206
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sarah Davis for and with Aaron Darsky (Trustee). Timothy Chambers for and with Ann Darsky (Petitioner). Debra Dolch (Proposed Trustee) also present.

Mr. Darsky powers are temporarily suspended. Ms. Dolch is appointed as Temporary Trustee. Bond is set at $400,000.00. Order for the same signed.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
